items.body:
Hi {first_name},

I run a UK & Ireland agency that works with tyre & fast-fit, and a few of your Google reviews mention people couldn't get through on the phone — usually a sign good enquiries are slipping through.

We put an AI voice receptionist on your line — it answers every call 24/7, books jobs, and instantly follows up web/SMS/DM enquiries, so you stop losing work to a missed call.

For a business your size that's typically several lost jobs a week — real money walking to whoever picks up first.

Worth a quick 10 minutes this week? Happy to show you exactly what TyrePro Midlands is missing and how we'd fix it.
